audit_findings.finding: PA-ASR-02: _analytics (lines 149-159) opened duckdb.connect() then ran analytics_init + INSERT loop + con.close() unguarded; exception in analytics_init or any INSERT skipped con.close(), leaking a write connection holding DuckDB file-level exclusive lock. process_file wraps _analytics in try/except Exception that prints & swallows → leak silent. Long-running run_loop (PA-ASR-01 fix enables it) would progressively block all analytics writes.
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap _analytics body (after con=duckdb.connect) in try/finally: con.close() in finally guarantees release even on exception. DONE this case (commit 94c777b).

audit_findings.finding: PA-ASR-03: query_habits second (read-write) connection (original lines 175-183 / worktree 195-203) same shape as PA-ASR-02 — analytics_init + 3 SELECTs + con.close() unguarded; raised exception leaks the connection.
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap second connection block in try/finally: con.close() in finally. DONE this case (commit 94c777b, same commit as PA-ASR-02).
